message:
cli: Fix turn detection to upload on first agent_message for new sessions

- Add isNewSession flag to track sessions created during service run
- Upload on first agent_message for new sessions (not just subsequent ones)
- Existing sessions on restart still skip first discovery to avoid re-uploads
- Clean up verbose debug logging

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/a5qf7mf76oap9323wxqnhloz
